discovery_sources.text: 77% of UAP reports from AARO (May 2023-June 2024) were identified as balloons; total 757 reports over 13 months
discovery_sources.origin: The Skeptics' Guide to the Universe: The Skeptics Guide #1076 - Feb 21 2026

discovery_sources.text: Only 2% of resolved UAP cases were commercial aircraft, 4% satellites, 8% birds, 16% drones
discovery_sources.origin: The Skeptics' Guide to the Universe: The Skeptics Guide #1076 - Feb 21 2026

discovery_sources.text: Zero evidence of extraterrestrial activity or breakthrough technologies in resolved UAP cases
